mapper.insert: insert into orders (number, status, user_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, origin_amount, coupon_amount, coupon_id, user_coupon_id, remark, phone, address, user_name, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, tableware_number, tableware_status, store_id, table_id, table_no, stock_deducted) VALUES (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{originAmount}, #{couponAmount}, #{couponId}, #{userCouponId}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{userName}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus}, #{storeId}, #{tableId}, #{tableNo}, #{stockDeducted})
mapper.update:
update orders
cancel_reason=#{cancelReason},
rejection_reason=#{rejectionReason},
cancel_time=#{cancelTime},
pay_status=#{payStatus},
pay_method=#{payMethod},
checkout_time=#{checkoutTime},
status = #{status},
store_id = #{storeId},
table_id = #{tableId},
table_no = #{tableNo},
stock_deducted = #{stockDeducted}
where id = #{id}
